results.evidence: queueSyncEvent() utility in src/core/sync/event-queue.ts writes events to .specweave/state/event-queue/pending.jsonl. Tests: tests/unit/sync/event-queue.test.ts (7 tests, all pass)

LifecycleHookDispatcher.onTaskCompleted() at line 117 checks syncMode and queues via queueSyncEvent when 'queued'. Tests: lifecycle-hook-dispatcher-queue.test.ts verifies queue called and LivingDocsSync NOT called

LifecycleHookDispatcher.onIncrementDone() at line 215 queues when syncMode='queued' AND !options.directSync. When directSync=true (from specweave complete), direct sync runs. Tests: lifecycle-hook-dispatcher-queue.test.ts covers both paths
StatusChangeSyncTrigger.spawnAsyncSync() at line 223 checks getSyncMode() and queues via queueSyncEvent when 'queued'. Tests: status-change-sync-trigger-queue.test.ts (3 tests)
post-tool-use.sh at lines 286-297 reads sync.mode from config.json via jq, defaults to 'queued'. When queued, writes JSON event to pending.jsonl instead of calling project-bridge-handler

sync.mode typed as 'queued' | 'immediate' in src/core/config/types.ts:211. getSyncMode() in LifecycleHookDispatcher (line 428) and StatusChangeSyncTrigger (line 283) both default to 'queued' when unset

sync-setup.ts delegates to setupIssueTracker() which asks: tracker type (select), credentials/validation, then per-tracker config. Single-project flows through the standard prompt path with 3-5 questions

setupIssueTracker() handles multi-project via ADO credentials reuse (setupAdoWithExistingCredentials) with per-project area path configuration. GitHub handles multi-repo via configureGitHubRepositories()
sync-setup.ts line 66: options.quick || isNonTTY triggers non-interactive mode. Validates existing config, runs health checks, exits without prompts. SyncSetupOptions.quick typed at line 25
